main.content:
{{SF6-Version |version=[[Street Fighter 6/Version/2.0202|2.0202]] |gameversion=2.0202 |date=April 15, 2026 |summary=Bug fixes for the game system as well as JP and M. Bison. |links=[https://www.streetfighter.com/6/buckler/battle_change/20260415 Patch Notes] }} == '''Universal Changes''' == * '''Drive Parry''' ** Fixed issue where {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} could not be performed at certain timings after parrying an attack, causing the player to be locked into their parry recovery animation when attempting a punish * '''Input Buffer''' ** If the opponent's {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}} freeze overlaps with a downed character's wakeup input buffer window, the buffer timing will be reduced from 10f → 7f ** This change was made due to issues caused by the previous patch [[Street_Fighter_6/Version/2.02|(Version 2.02)]] which increased the wakeup input buffer by 3 frames * '''Modern Controls''' ** Fixed issue where after certain airborne moves (e.g. Dhalsim's Yoga Float, Rashid's Wing Stroke), if the opponent activated {{clr|DR|Drive Rush}}, the airborne character could not use air normals with the Auto button for a short time
== '''Character Changes''' == === '''JP''' === * {{clr|H|Departure: Shadow}} (214P/{{clr|OD|PP}}~{{clr|H|214HP}}) ** Fixed issue where the startup was 1 frame faster when canceled into from {{clr|L|2LK}}, {{clr|M|5MP}}, {{clr|M|2MK}}, or {{clr|H|5HK}}
=== '''M. Bison''' === * Devil Reverse + Psycho Mine ([2]8K~P + Mine) ** Fixed issue where the Psycho Mine would stay embedded if a {{clr|DR|Drive Reversal}} was performed after blocking the 2nd hit * Devil Reverse + Psycho Mine ([2]8K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~P + Mine) / Somersault Skull Diver ([2]8K/{{clr|OD|KK}}~K~P + Mine) ** Fixed issue where the attack could not hit from behind under some circumstances, causing M. Bison to whiff through the opponent's body
